query:
SELECT d.wireguard_pubkey pubkey, active_session.preshared_key "preshared_key!", ARRAY(
                    SELECT host(ip)
                    FROM unnest(wnd.wireguard_ips) AS ip
                ) "allowed_ips!: Vec<String>" FROM wireguard_network_device wnd JOIN device d ON wnd.device_id = d.id JOIN "user" u ON d.user_id = u.id JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT preshared_key FROM vpn_client_session WHERE location_id = wnd.wireguard_network_id AND device_id = wnd.device_id AND state IN ('new', 'connected') AND preshared_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) active_session ON true WHERE wireguard_network_id = $1 AND d.configured AND u.is_active ORDER BY d.id ASC
